name: Error-level records (non-local)
description: Catches all error-level log records and exceptions from non-local environments. Includes logfire.error(), logfire.exception(), and unhandled exceptions — covers cases that Logfire Issues misses (like subprocess failures logged via logfire.error). Excludes: Anthropic API errors (retried automatically), APScheduler misfire warnings, HITL ApprovalRequired exceptions, and APScheduler job re-registration INSERT conflicts (expected on every deploy).
query:
SELECT
    r.start_timestamp,
    r.trace_id,
    'https://logfire-us.pydantic.dev/espo412/portfolio'
        || '?q=trace_id%3D%27' || r.trace_id || '%27'
        AS trace_url,
    r.span_name,
    r.message,
    r.is_exception,
    r.exception_type,
    r.deployment_environment
FROM records AS r
WHERE r.level >= 17
  AND r.service_name = 'fastapi'
  AND (r.deployment_environment IS NULL OR r.deployment_environment != 'local')
  AND r.span_name NOT LIKE '%POST api.anthropic.com%'
  AND r.span_name NOT LIKE '%Run time of job%'
  AND COALESCE(r.exception_type, '') != 'pydantic_ai.exceptions.ApprovalRequired'
  AND NOT (r.span_name = 'INSERT neondb' AND r.message LIKE '%apscheduler_jobs%')
ORDER BY r.start_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 5
